35.reason: [Operator precedence error: assignment 'c = fgetc(in)' should be parenthesized as '(c = fgetc(in)) != EOF' to correctly assign and compare. Without parentheses, it assigns the result of 'fgetc(in) != EOF' (0 or 1) to c, causing incorrect character handling.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Operator precedence error: assignment 'c = fgetc(in)' should be parenthesized as '(c = fgetc(in)) != EOF' to correctly read character and compare]

Without parentheses, it assigns the result of 'fgetc(in) != EOF' (0 or 1) to c, causing incorrect character handling.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Operator precedence error: assignment 'c = fgetc(in)' should be parenthesized because '!=' has higher precedence than '=', causing c to be assigned the result of the comparison (0 or 1), not the character read.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Operator precedence error: assignment 'c = fgetc(in)' should be parenthesized as '(c = fgetc(in)) != EOF' to correctly assign the character and compare. Without parentheses, it assigns the result of 'fgetc(in) != EOF' (0 or 1) to c, causing incorrect behavior.]

60.reason: [Uninitialized count field: sheet[k].count is not initialized to 1 when a new word is added]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Uninitialized count field: sheet[k].count is not initialized to 1 when a new word is added]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Uninitialized count field: sheet[k].count is used without initialization; should set sheet[k].count = 1]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Logic error: after incrementing num, k == num-1, but here k is still the old value (equal to original num), so writing to sheet[num] which is out of current valid range; also, count is never set to 1.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Logic error: 'k' equals 'num' before incrementing 'num', so after 'num++', 'k' is one less than 'num'. But the word is stored at index 'k' which is now beyond the previous valid range. However, more critically, the count field for this new word is never set to 1.]

55.reason: [Uninitialized count field: when a new word is added, its count is never initialized to 1; it uses garbage value. Also, empty string may be inserted when non-alpha follows another non-alpha.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Uninitialized count field: when a new word is added, its count is never initialized to 1; it uses garbage value. Also, empty string may be inserted when non-alpha follows another non-alpha.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Uninitialized count: when a new word is added, its count is never initialized to 1. The array 'sheet' is global so count starts at 0, and this increments it to 1 only on second occurrence. First occurrence leaves it uninitialized (0), leading to wrong counts.]
